OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on THURS-OCT-23-2008: Alan Horwitz, counsel for plaintiff Equity Residential Properties Management Corporation; Joe Dell, agent, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Robert M. Amparan, counsel by special appearance for defendant Erin Hart

Settlement conference is held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 639 Geary Street, #317, San Francisco. The OCT-27-2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Bill Rauch, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (218)
